game_info.title: Sally Face: Strange Neighbors
game_info.concept:
Delve into a dark adventure following the boy with a prosthetic face and a tragic past. Unravel the sinister mysteries of Sally's world to find the truth that lies hidden beneath the shadows.

A DARK MYSTERY IS UNFOLDING...

Delve into an unsettling adventure following the boy with a prosthetic face and a tragic past. In the first episode, Strange Neighbors, Sally Face and his father move into an apartment filled with odd tenants and an unfortunate crime scene. Little did they know what misfortune still awaits...

Unravel the sinister mysteries of Sally's world to find the truth that lies hidden beneath the shadows.

FEATURES

Intriguing narrative will linger in your thoughts

Speak with the dead, using handheld video game system, the Gear Boy

Handcrafted by a solo dev: including art, design and music

Inspired by 1990s cartoons and personal nightmares

Bizarre characters, ponies, headbanging and more

EPISODES

The game is composed of five episodes in total. The first episode offers a short introduction to Sally Face, which the subsequent episodes greatly expand upon.

GAMEPLAY

In this story-driven adventure game, players will interact with Sal's world and his nightmares. The main path typically requires casual effort. However, there are hidden layers to be uncovered that will invoke a bit of head-scratching, for those players up to the challenge.

For Support, email mike@portablemoose.com
game_info.description: You are Sal, a boy with a prosthetic face investigating the dark mysteries of Addison Apartments. Navigate through eerie hallways, collect clues, solve puzzles, and uncover the sinister truth. Use your Gear Boy device to interact with supernatural elements. Watch out for lurking shadows and ghostly apparitions. Collect all evidence pieces to unlock the final mystery and escape the nightmare.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Sal through the apartment
Z: Interact with objects/doors/clues
Space: Use Gear Boy to detect supernatural activity
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart from title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic movement and navigation through the apartment building. Verify that the player can move in all directions, interact with doors, and collect simple clues without encountering game-breaking bugs.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through each room systematically using arrow keys. Interact with every door and clue using Z. Test collision detection with walls and furniture. Verify sprite animations and state transitions work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates all accessible rooms, collects at least 3 clues, and can move fluidly without getting stuck. No collision errors or visual glitches occur. Test passes when player reaches at least 50% map coverage.

TEST_2.test_description: Test complete game completion path. Execute optimal strategy to collect all clues, solve all puzzles, and reach the win condition by uncovering the apartment's dark secret.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow shortest path to all clue locations. Use Gear Boy at marked supernatural hotspots. Interact with all key NPCs and objects in correct sequence. Collect all evidence pieces and trigger the final revelation sequence.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect all 8 evidence pieces, solve the central mystery, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score should reach maximum value (800 points). Test passes when win screen displays within reasonable time frame.

TEST_3.test_description: Test Gear Boy supernatural detection mechanic. Verify that the device correctly identifies ghostly presences and reveals hidden clues when used in specific locations.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Use Space key systematically in each room. Monitor Gear Boy activation visual effects. Verify that supernatural entities become visible and interactable when detected. Test cooldown mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Gear Boy successfully detects at least 4 supernatural entities. Hidden clues become visible. No crashes occur during detection sequences. Visual feedback clearly indicates active/inactive states.
TEST_3.description: Test Gear Boy supernatural detection mechanic. Verify that the device correctly identifies ghostly presences and reveals hidden clues when used in specific locations.

TEST_3.expected: Gear Boy successfully detects at least 4 supernatural entities. Hidden clues become visible. No crashes occur during detection sequences. Visual feedback clearly indicates active/inactive states.

TEST_4.test_description: Test enemy AI and collision detection with shadow creatures. Verify that enemies patrol correctly, detect the player, and trigger appropriate game over conditions upon contact.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally approach shadow creatures to test detection range. Verify chase behavior activates. Test collision damage and health depletion mechanics. Observe patrol patterns and spawning behavior.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Enemies successfully detect player within range, chase appropriately, and deal damage on contact. Player health decreases correctly. Game over triggers when health reaches zero. AI pathfinding works without errors.
TEST_4.description: Test enemy AI and collision detection with shadow creatures. Verify that enemies patrol correctly, detect the player, and trigger appropriate game over conditions upon contact.

TEST_5.test_description: Test puzzle-solving mechanics and door unlocking sequences. Verify that collecting specific clue combinations properly unlocks progression-blocking doors.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Collect clues in various orders. Attempt to unlock doors before and after obtaining required evidence. Test puzzle logic gates and conditional progression triggers.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Doors remain locked until correct clues are collected. Puzzle solutions work consistently. Visual feedback indicates locked/unlocked states. No sequence-breaking exploits exist.
TEST_5.description: Test puzzle-solving mechanics and door unlocking sequences. Verify that collecting specific clue combinations properly unlocks progression-blocking doors.
TEST_5.strategy: Collect clues in various orders. Attempt to unlock doors before and after obtaining required evidence. Test puzzle logic gates and conditional progression triggers.
TEST_5.expected: Doors remain locked until correct clues are collected. Puzzle solutions work consistently. Visual feedback indicates locked/unlocked states. No sequence-breaking exploits exist.

TEST_6.test_description: Test sprint mechanic and stamina system. Verify that holding Shift increases movement speed appropriately and that stamina depletes/regenerates correctly.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Hold Shift continuously to deplete stamina completely. Release to test regeneration. Alternate between sprinting and walking. Verify speed differences and visual indicators.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Sprint speed is noticeably faster than walk speed. Stamina depletes during sprint and regenerates when not sprinting. Visual indicator accurately reflects stamina level. No infinite sprint exploits.

TEST_7.test_description: Test pause/resume functionality and state persistence. Verify that pausing during various game states (exploration, combat, cutscenes) works correctly and game resumes properly.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Press ESC during different gameplay situations. Verify pause overlay appears correctly. Test resume functionality. Check that game state (position, health, inventory) persists correctly.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Game pauses immediately in all contexts. Pause overlay renders correctly over game state. Resuming returns to exact same state. No progress is lost. Multiple pause/resume cycles work flawlessly.
TEST_7.description: Test pause/resume functionality and state persistence. Verify that pausing during various game states (exploration, combat, cutscenes) works correctly and game resumes properly.
